name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-16
title: tdd-context.py reads wrong key for deprecation criterion
description: tdd-context.py main() reads deprecation = data.get('deprecation') or {} then deprecation.get('criterion'). But real feature.json uses a flat 'deprecation_criterion' top-level field (no nested 'deprecation' object). For every real feature, tdd-context.py emits empty 'deprecation_criterion' and 'Deprecation criterion:' (text mode). Test test-context.py c4 passes only because its fixture uses the legacy nested 'deprecation': {'criterion': ...} form, so the bug is invisible to tests. Fix: read data.get('deprecation_criterion') with fallback to nested form for backward compat. Similarly, tdd-context.py reads 'status' and 'contract' fields that no longer exist in feature.json schema — these output as null.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: BUG-16 flat deprecation_criterion key; BUG-17 test/run.py; BUG-37 item.json in SKILL.md B/B mode.
